energy.label: Power
energy.description: The force needed to keep hearths, mills, workshops, and vital town functions operating.
energy.mechanism_description: Power in Camelot comes from fuel, animal work, mill force, and human labor.

glossary.quick_explain: Power represents the force needed to keep work, heating, and essential town functions going.
glossary.why_it_matters: If power fails, mills slow, repairs stall, and water access may worsen.

tutorial.player_hint: Read what power means in this scenario before acting.
common_misreadings: Power here does not mean electricity.

water.label: Water Access
water.description: Reliable access to well water, river hauling, and stored water supplies.
water.mechanism_description: Water access depends on labor, transport, and the upkeep of local infrastructure.

glossary.quick_explain: Water access tracks whether homes and institutions can still get enough usable water.
glossary.why_it_matters: Water problems quickly harm health and confidence in the crown.

tutorial.player_hint: Water often weakens after power and transport strain.

food.label: Food Stores
food.description: Grain, salted stores, and delivered food available to town and countryside.
food.mechanism_description: Food security depends on harvest stores, hauling, and enough labor and water to keep supply moving.

glossary.quick_explain: Food stores measure whether the court can keep people supplied through the winter.
glossary.why_it_matters: Food strain weakens health, labor, and trust between town and countryside.

glossary.quick_explain: Health shows how well people can survive the winter strain.
glossary.why_it_matters: Poor health shrinks labor capacity and raises visible hardship.

workforce.label: Available Labor
workforce.description: Peasant, guild, and household labor available for the crown to direct.
workforce.mechanism_description: Labor depends on health, trust, and how much strain people will bear.

glossary.quick_explain: Available labor shows how much useful work the realm can still direct this turn.
glossary.why_it_matters: Low labor slows hauling, repairs, and relief work.

treasury.label: Crown Reserves
treasury.description: The crown's remaining room to fund relief and bargaining.

glossary.quick_explain: Crown reserves are the money and stored value the court can still spend on relief.
glossary.why_it_matters: Weak reserves make every future response smaller and more political.

trust.label: Common Trust
trust.description: How much ordinary people believe the court is acting fairly and effectively.

glossary.quick_explain: Common trust shows whether households still believe the crown is keeping faith with them.
glossary.why_it_matters: Low trust makes every sacrifice and shortage feel more dangerous.

legitimacy.label: Royal Authority
legitimacy.description: The accepted right of the crown to direct the realm under strain.

glossary.quick_explain: Royal authority is the realm's belief that the crown can fairly command obedience.
glossary.why_it_matters: Low authority makes strong action politically costly.

logistics.label: Road and Wagon Capacity
logistics.description: How much relief, fuel, and repair work the realm can move in time to matter.
logistics.mechanism_description: Transport depends on passable roads, available animals, and enough secure labor and escorts.

glossary.quick_explain: Road and wagon capacity measures whether the realm can still move relief and repairs.
glossary.why_it_matters: Weak transport turns every shortage into a broader crisis.

water_delivery.label: Water Access
water_delivery.description: Reliable access to wells, hauling, and stored water.
water_delivery.failure_text: Wells, hauling, and local distribution may become unreliable.

glossary.quick_explain: Water access is the function people depend on, not just stored water.
glossary.why_it_matters: Losing water access quickly harms health and confidence in the crown.

heating_access.label: Warmth and Hearth Access
heating_access.description: Reliable access to heat, hearths, and other winter survival support.
heating_access.failure_text: Homes and institutions may lose dependable warmth.

glossary.quick_explain: Warmth access shows whether the realm can keep people heated through the winter.
glossary.why_it_matters: Cold exposure quickly worsens hardship and trust.

food_distribution.label: Food Distribution
food_distribution.description: Movement of grain and stores into homes and institutions.
food_distribution.failure_text: Storehouses and deliveries may fail to reach people reliably.

glossary.quick_explain: Food distribution matters because supplies must still reach people.
glossary.why_it_matters: Distribution weakness can create shortages even when stores exist.

transport_access.label: Road Access
transport_access.description: Movement across roads, tracks, and escort routes.
transport_access.failure_text: Road access may bottleneck relief and repairs.

glossary.quick_explain: Road access tracks whether the realm can still move what it needs.
glossary.why_it_matters: Weak road access delays every other fix.

medical_care.label: Abbey Care
medical_care.description: Capacity to care for the sick and vulnerable.
medical_care.failure_text: Care for the vulnerable may become unreliable.

glossary.quick_explain: Abbey care stands in for formal medical support in Camelot.
glossary.why_it_matters: Visible failures here quickly damage trust.

emergency_response.label: Crown Response
emergency_response.description: How effectively the crown can react to sudden strain.
emergency_response.failure_text: The crown's emergency response may slow down.

glossary.quick_explain: Crown response combines resources, transport, and authority.
glossary.why_it_matters: Slow response magnifies hardship and resentment.

public_order.label: Realm Stability
public_order.description: Visible stability across town, countryside, and elite relations.

glossary.quick_explain: Realm stability tracks whether daily life and obedience remain workable.
glossary.why_it_matters: Visible instability makes every shortage harder to manage.

water.label: Well and River Water
water.description: Emergency water for homes and relief work.

electricity.label: Hearth and Mill Power
electricity.description: Emergency support for vital work capacity.

materials.label: Timber and Stone
materials.description: Repair materials for roads, mills, and infrastructure.

labor_hours.label: Guild and Peasant Labor
labor_hours.description: Useful labor available for hauling, repair, and relief.

energy_instability.label: Power may fail soon
energy_instability.summary: Camelot's available work and heating power is at risk of falling too low.
energy_instability.if_ignored: If power fails, mills, hauling, and water access may weaken together.
energy_instability.mitigation_hint: Buy power or fuel and protect labor.

water_shortage.label: Water access may break down
water_shortage.summary: Wells, hauling, and stored water are under strain.
water_shortage.if_ignored: If water weakens further, health and food stability may fall next.
water_shortage.mitigation_hint: Protect power, labor, and repair materials.

food_collapse.label: Food stores are running low
food_collapse.summary: Winter stores and distribution are under strain.
food_collapse.if_ignored: If food keeps falling, health and trust between town and countryside may worsen.
food_collapse.mitigation_hint: Buy food and keep water and transport working.

budget_erosion.label: Crown reserves are under pressure
budget_erosion.summary: The crown's ability to keep funding relief is shrinking.
budget_erosion.if_ignored: If reserves keep falling, future emergency options will narrow.
budget_erosion.mitigation_hint: Use targeted purchases and avoid unnecessary strain.

unrest_spike.label: Labor strain is rising
unrest_spike.summary: Winter hardship is increasing social and labor strain.
unrest_spike.if_ignored: If strain rises further, labor and service problems may spread.
unrest_spike.mitigation_hint: Protect visible relief and avoid preventable hardship.

institutional_breakdown.label: Court systems may jam up
institutional_breakdown.summary: Roads, escorts, granaries, and relief institutions are under stress.
institutional_breakdown.if_ignored: If institutions stall, supplies may not reach people in time.
institutional_breakdown.mitigation_hint: Support transport, repairs, and visible coordination.

political_stalemate.label: Support for strong action is weakening
political_stalemate.summary: Court unity and elite cooperation are becoming harder to hold.
political_stalemate.if_ignored: If support falls further, stronger policies may become unavailable.
political_stalemate.mitigation_hint: Choose relief that key groups can still defend.

public_trust_collapse.label: Trust in the court is slipping
public_trust_collapse.summary: Households and local groups are losing confidence in the crown.
public_trust_collapse.if_ignored: If trust falls, backlash and instability may spread faster.
public_trust_collapse.mitigation_hint: Protect the services people see and feel most directly.

town_households.label: Town Households
town_households.description: Families facing cold homes, thin rations, and unreliable wells.

village_farmers.label: Village Farmers
village_farmers.description: Rural households managing winter strain and court demands.

castle_guard.label: Castle Guard and Stablehands
castle_guard.description: Workers carrying long watches, hauling, and repair fatigue.

abbey_patients.label: Abbey Patients
abbey_patients.description: People depending on warmth, broth, and reliable care.
